info.title: AWorld API - App Endpoints
info.description: The App context provides APIs for integrating with and extending applications built on the AWorld platform. These APIs are designed for use in end-user applications and client-side interfaces.

post.description:
Creates a new activity log entry for a user. 
    This endpoint is intended for backend systems to record custom user activities defined through the Dashboard. 
    Built-in activities such as quizzes, stories, and other internal events are automatically tracked and should not be manually created through this endpoint.

parameters.name: x-idempotency-key
parameters.description: Optional (but recommended) idempotency key to prevent duplicate processing of the same request. Any string can be used (e.g., a UUID or a nanoid).

schema.description: Optional (but recommended) idempotency key to prevent duplicate processing of the same request. Any string can be used (e.g., a UUID or a nanoid).

get.description: Retrieves the workspace configuration for the authenticated user's workspace. Returns branding, layout, theme, languages, features, and networking settings.

missionType.description: Type of mission (individual or group-based). When set to GROUP, progress is tracked collectively for all users associated with the same tag, according to the mission rules or manual assignment.

missionConfigurationId.description: Unique identifier for the mission configuration (NanoID).

matchType.description: Determines how the mission's conditions are matched. When set to INSTANCE, a specific entity ID must be provided in matchEntityId. When set to ENTITY, all instances of the specified entity type are considered. When set to TAG, all entities associated with the specified tag ID are considered.

matchEntity.description: The entity type the mission's conditions apply to. When matchType is set to TAG, matchEntity must be set to Tag.

workspaceConfigurationId.description: Unique identifier for the workspace configuration (same as workspaceId).

name.description: Display name override for the workspace.

logo.description: URL to the workspace logo image.

font.description: Font configuration. Accepts a FontConfig object or a plain string (legacy Google Fonts name).

family.description: Font family name to use in CSS (e.g. 'Univers LT Std').

url.description: CDN URL of the font file.

items.description: A single custom font file reference.

theme.description: Theme configuration with light and dark mode support.

defaultLanguage.description: Default language code for the workspace.

features.description: Feature flags configuration. Supports boolean or object with enabled flag.

learningPaths.description: Learning paths, learning groups, and learning path rules feature flag.

activities.description: Custom activities, quizzes, and slides feature flag.

missions.description: Mission configurations and mission rules feature flag.

streak.description: Streak configurations and streak rules feature flag.

onboarding.description: Native onboarding flow. When enabled, new users see a 3-step welcome carousel before login. Defaults to disabled.

extensions.description: Extensions app configuration for custom workspace experiences (onboarding, daily activities).

onboarding.description: Custom onboarding flow. When enabled, users are redirected to a workspace-specific onboarding experience after login.

dailyActivity.description: Custom daily activity card. When enabled, the edu home shows a dynamic activity card with content managed by the Extensions app.

allowedOrigins.description: Additional CORS origins beyond auto-computed platform defaults and client domains.

privacyPolicyUrl.description: URL to the workspace privacy policy document.

security.description: Security settings controlling workspace access and signup restrictions.

signupMode.description: Controls how users can join this workspace. Defaults to INVITE_ONLY for security.

allowedDomains.description: Email domains allowed for self-service signup (e.g., ['company.com', 'partner.org']). When set, all self-service paths (codes, referrals, open signup) enforce this domain check. Admin invitations bypass it. Empty or omitted means no domain restriction.

defaultUserRole.description: Default role assigned to new users joining this workspace.

tagNamespaces.description: Configuration for tag namespace grouping and display in the backoffice.

learningPath.description: Tag namespaces associated with learning paths.

icon.description: Lucide icon name to display for this namespace.

labelKey.description: i18n key used for the namespace display label.

icon.description: Lucide icon name to display for this namespace.

labelKey.description: i18n key used for the namespace display label.

createdAt.description: Creation date in ISO format (UTC Timezone)

updatedAt.description: Creation date in ISO format (UTC Timezone)

JsonLogicExpression.description:
A JSON Logic expression used to define conditional rules in a declarative way.

JSON Logic is a lightweight way to express rules, conditions, and decision trees in JSON format.
This schema only validates that the input is valid JSON; it does not validate the correctness of
the JSON Logic operators or semantics.
notes: This schema ensures only that the value is valid JSON.
JSON Logic supports a wide variety of operators such as `==`, `and`, `or`, `>`, `<`, etc.
Consumers should validate semantics at runtime.

catalogBadgeConfigurationId.description: ID of the badge configuration in the catalog (if applicable).

syncWithCatalog.description: Whether the badge configuration should sync with catalog updates.

progressSourceEntityType.description: Entity type that provides progress data for this badge.

progressSourceEntityId.description: ID of the entity configuration that provides progress (e.g., missionConfigurationId).

defaultLang.description: Default language code for the badge's content.

langs.description: List of available language codes for this badge.
